reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
강릉 여행때 입으려고 샀는데.. 진짜 너무 맘에들었던 옷이었어요💕 원래 핑크는 잘 안받는 저희 갈색 강쥐인데 요 핑꾸는 너무 이뻐요!! 
저희집 털둥이는 털이 많아서 옷입을때 목쪽에 털이 많이 삐져나와서 안이뻤는데 똑딱이 단추를 풀어주면 아이가 편하기도 하면서 뭔가 포인트도 되는게 정말 맘에들어요!!!

2.4kg 감자는 S 너무 타이트 하지도 않고 딱 맞아요!
reviews.content_en: I bought this for a trip to Gangneung and I absolutely loved it! 💕 My brown pup normally doesn't look good in pink, but this pink color is so pretty!! My fur baby has a lot of fur, so when wearing clothes there's usually a lot sticking out around the neck area which doesn't look great. But when I undo the snap buttons, it's comfortable for her and becomes such a cute accent point - I love it!!! My 2.4kg potato in size S fits perfectly - not too tight at all!

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
쫀쫀하면서 너무 두껍지도 않은 원단이어서 만져봤을때 엄청 편해보이는 옷이었어요! 불편하면 물어뜯는 강쥐였는데 이 옷은 편하지 놀러가는 내내 편하게 착용하고 있었어요💜

앞쪽에 똑딱이 단추와 귀여운 포켓랑 ssfw 로고가 포인트 되면서  S강아지들이 입어도 넘나 작고 귀여운 아가옷 같아요~

2.4kg 감자는 S이 너무 타이트 하지 않고 딱 편하개 맞아요!!
reviews.content_en: The fabric is stretchy but not too thick, so it looks super comfortable to wear when you touch it! My pup is usually one who chews on things if they're uncomfortable, but this one was so comfy that she wore it all throughout the trip without any issues 💜 With the snap buttons in front, cute pockets, and the SSFW logo as an accent point, even when size S pups wear it, it looks like an adorable baby outfit~ My 2.4kg potato in size S fits perfectly - not too tight at all, just right and comfy!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 재질 너무 좋고 3.3키로 마른체형 강아지한테 M사이즈 아주 넉넉하게 잘맞아요. 보라색이랑 연두색 중에 고민하다 샀는데 연보라 너무 이뿌구요 🥰 연두색도 또 사고싶어요.
reviews.content_en: The material is really nice and size M fits my 3.3kg lean-build pup very well with plenty of room. I was torn between purple and light green but went with the muted purple and it's so pretty 🥰 I want to buy the light green too.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
허리가 긴 말티푸에게 딱 ! 가슴둘레 40-42 왔다갔다해서 라지했는데 타잇하지않고 적당해요!! 
특히 가슴에 똑딱이라 입히기 수월하네요 
색상도 차분한 라벤더라 좋아요
리드줄이 강한 레드라 찰떡! 

첨엔 안입을려고 하더니 입고나니 지금은 계속 잘입고 있어요
reviews.content_en: Perfect for my long-waisted Maltipoo! Her chest is between 40-42cm so I got large, and it fits just right - not too tight! The snap buttons in front make it really easy to put on. I also love the calm lavender color, and the red leash is such a perfect match! She was reluctant to wear it at first, but now she wears it comfortably all the time.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 쫀쫀하고 신축성이 좋아서 옷 안좋아하는 저희 애기두 편하게 입었어요🫶🏻 색감은 말해모해 쵝오입니다..💜 파스텔톤이라 모색 상관없이 잘 어울리는 색 같아요 !!
reviews.content_en: The fabric is stretchy and elastic so even my pup who doesn't like wearing clothes wore it comfortably 🫶🏻 The color is just *chef's kiss*... 💜 The pastel tone suits any coat color perfectly!!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
조금 크긴한데 엑라했음 너무 딱맞아서 불편해했을것같아요!
색 너무 예쁘고 잘어울려요 ㅠㅠㅎ 재질도 부들부들하니 너무 맘에듭니당 다른색도 구매욕구드네여,,,❣️
reviews.content_en: It's a bit big, but if I had sized down to XL it would have been way too tight and she would have been uncomfortable! The color is so pretty and suits her well ㅠㅠㅎ The material is so soft too, I love it, and now I want to buy other colors 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
2.2키로 비숑인데 s사이즈 너무 잘맞아요!
핑크 색감도 예쁘고 소재도 와플조직이라 고급스러워보여요 ㅋㅋ
여기 옷 너무 맘에 들어서 겨울옷도 구매하려구요!
reviews.content_en: My 2.2kg Bichon fits perfectly in size S! The pink color is so pretty and the waffle-textured fabric looks really luxurious ㅋㅋ I love this brand's clothes so much that I'm planning to buy winter clothes from them too!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 옷입히기도 편하고 색감, 사이즈, 원단도 다 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's easy to put on and the color, size, and fabric are all great.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 실내복으로 딱이에요!! 에쎕떱 디자인 넘 이쁘고 귀여워용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's perfect as loungewear!! The aesthetic design is so pretty and adorable ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
s사이즈가 품절이라 재입고 됐길래 바로 샀어요!
보라색… 너무 예쁘네요🥺 다들 사세요…💜
reviews.content_en: Size S was out of stock but they restocked it so I bought it right away! The purple... is so pretty 🥺 Everyone should buy it... 💜

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 얼마전에 핑크색 구매하고 넘 이뻐서 라벤더색으로 재구매했어모. 니트원단도 탄탄하고 색상도 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I bought the pink one recently and loved it so much that I repurchased in lavender. The knit fabric is sturdy and the colors are beautiful.
